name: Order Delivery Date:
variant:
Maintenance Spill Pads – Spill Kit Refills
Highly absorbent pads for rapid response to drink spills and small leaks around the convention venue. Supplied in bundles to replenish maintenance spill kits and keep teams ready to respond.

name: Order Delivery Date:
variant:
10L Rapid Response Spill Kit - Clip Closed Bag
Vinyl Bag

Portable carry kit for quickly dealing with drink spills during conventions. Absorbent pads soak up tea, coffee and other liquids far faster than blue roll, while spill socks help contain moving spills and prevent spreading.

Kit includes:
- 10 x Maintenance Absorbent Pads
- 1 x 1.2m Maintenance Absorbent Socks
- 1 x Haz Waste Bags
- 1 x Clip Top Bag
- 1 x Tie
